rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-[#0A0A0A]
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight text-[#0A0A0A]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing + Technical Grids. Ensure high density for data, but ample padding around containers.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Grid Borders strategy. Use sharp, visible grid lines.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: None. Use 1px solid borders for visual hierarchy instead of shadows.

surface_strategies.cards_and_tables: Solid white (#FFFFFF) with 1px border (#0A0A0A at 15% opacity). No rounded corners.
surface_strategies.grid_borders: Apply 'border-r border-b border-black/15' to grid items to expose the skeleton and create a technical spreadsheet vibe.
surface_strategies.header: Solid white background with a hard 1px bottom border. No glassmorphism.

buttons.primary: bg-[#E63946] text-white rounded-none font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#0A0A0A] hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200 border border-[#E63946] hover:border-[#0A0A0A]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#0A0A0A] rounded-none font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#002FA7] hover:text-white hover:border-[#002FA7] transition-colors duration-200
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#555555] hover:text-[#0A0A0A] rounded-none px-4 py-2

inputs.text_field: bg-white border border-black/20 rounded-none px-4 py-3 text-[#0A0A0A] focus:border-[#002FA7] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:outline-none placeholder-black/40
inputs.search: Same as text field but with a stark search icon on the left.

tables.header_row: bg-[#F2F2F2] border-b border-black/15 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#555555]

cards_video.wrapper: flex flex-col border border-black/15 bg-white relative group
cards_video.thumbnail: aspect-video bg-black/5 w-full object-cover border-b border-black/15 grayscale-[20%] group-hover:grayscale-0 transition-all
cards_video.title: font-bold text-base leading-snug line-clamp-2 mb-2
cards_video.meta: font-mono text-xs text-[#555555] mb-4 flex gap-2 flex-wrap

progress_indicators.spinner: border-2 border-black/20 border-t-[#002FA7] rounded-full w-6 h-6 animate-spin

badges.hashtag: bg-[#F2F2F2] border border-black/10 text-[#555555] text-xs px-2 py-1 font-mono rounded-none

motion.philosophy: Functional and instant. No slow fades. High-contrast state changes.
motion.hover_states: Hard color swaps (e.g., Red to Black). No soft transparency fades.

icons.style: Use stroke-width 2. Functional, sharp, and consistent.
icons.size: w-5 h-5 for inline, w-8 h-8 for empty states.

image_urls.description: Abstract wave design in warm colors, used for the hero/empty state banner background when no channel is loaded. Apply grayscale and high contrast overlay.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. HYBRID/FULLSTACK BUILD: This is a downloader utility. Prioritize a pristine, high-contrast Swiss Brutalism UI design.
2. OVERRIDES: Strip all border-radius from Shadcn components. Use `rounded-none`. Replace soft shadows with hard 1px borders (`border-black/15`).
3. FONTS: Import and configure 'Chivo' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text in tailwind.config.js.
4. ACCESSIBILITY: Every interactive element MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="download-single-btn"`).
5. LAYOUT: For the video list, you can choose a high-density Data Table OR a rigid Grid (Bento) of cards. Both must adhere to the 1px sharp border rule.
6. HOVER STATES: Ensure hover states explicitly change the text color and background to maintain APCA contrast (e.g., hover:bg-black hover:text-white).

7. EMPTY STATE: Use the provided `empty_state_hero` image as a striking hero background before a user inputs a channel URL. Overlay it with a white/grey tint (`bg-white/80` or `bg-[#F2F2F2]/90`) so text is legible.
8. API/BACKEND: Ensure the backend handles fetching YouTube videos, extracting Shorts, parsing hashtags, downloading single/bulk (ZIP), and reporting progress.
